programme.title: Raphael Pichon, Ensemble Pygmalion, Sabine Devieilhe & Arnaud de Pasquale
programme.sub-title: Mozart - A Gala for the Weber Sisters
programme.desc: On March 23, 1783, Wolfgang Amadeus Mozart gave a successful concert at Vienna's Burgtheater that he dedicated to two sopranos: Aloysia and Josepha Weber, the sisters of his wife Constanze. The concert's program would be considered odd by today's standards. The composer's Symphony No. 35 was broken up and interspersed with other compositions, such as concertos, arias, and works for solo piano. Nearly two and a half centuries later, French soprano Sabine Devieilhe, conductor Raphaël Pichon and his Ensemble Pygmalion bring a wonderful concert inspired by that remarkable event. The program includes: ‘Allegro con spirito' of Symphony No. 35, also known as the Haffner Symphony ‘Vorrei spiegarvi, oh Dio', KV 418 ‘Schon lacht der holde Frühling', KV 580 Trio of ‘Die Schlittenfahrt' No. 3, KV 605 Deutscher Tanz No. 6, KV 571 ‘Der Hölle Rache kocht in meinem Herzen' from Mozart's opera Die Zauberflöte ‘Finale: Presto' of Symphony No. 35 ‘Nehmt meinen Dank', KV 383 and ‘Dans un bois solitaire et sombre', KV 308. This performance was recorded at Théâtre Impérial de Compiègne, in Compiègne, France.

programme.title: Jodie Devos, Anaik Morel & David Violi
programme.sub-title: Tribute to French Romanticism at Venice
programme.desc: Salon Romantique à Venise salutes the work of the Palazzetto Bru Zane foundation which aims to contribute to the rediscovery of a neglected part of the French musical heritage running from Louis XVi to WW I. This concert offers a journey into the French romantic repertoire performed by pianist David Violi (piano), Jodie Devos (soprano) and Anaik Morel (mezzo-soprano). The program contains some of the most beloved French arias, such as 'Seguedille' from Bizet's Carmen by Bizet, the Flower Duet from Delibes' Lakmé and 'Mon cœur s'ouvre à ta voix' from Saint-Saëns Samson et Dalila. Recorded at the Palazzetoo Bru Zane in Venice, Italy in 2016.

programme.title: Nikolay Lugansky
programme.desc: Cinematic classical clips and energizing concert pieces featuring up-and-coming artists.

programme.title: Rodolfo Mederos, Otros Aires, Teresa Parodi & Café de los Maestros
programme.desc: For the audience in the famous ballroom El Palacio in Buenos Aires, the year 2012 began with tango rhythms and Argentinean folk music. This festive broadcast opens with a tango performance by dance partners Eduardo and Gloria, accompanied by the renowned ensemble Café de los Maestros. Another highlights is a performance by bandoneon player Rodolfo Mederos and his trio. In addition, the concert features a performance by Teresa Parodi, former lead singer of the Astor Piazzolla Band, accompanied by the Fernando Suárez Paz Quintet. Also on the bill is the contemporary electronic tango formation Otros Aires. Founded by Miguel Di Genova in 2003, Otros Aires combines electronic rhythms and traditional tango instruments, such as the bandoneon, piano, and guitar. On the program are compositions by Astor Piazzolla, Pedro Maffia, Pedro Laurenz, Gustavo Mozzi, and many others. Enjoy this concert of music and dance, featuring some of Argentine's tango scene's finest artists!

programme.title: Federico Guglielmo & Roberto Loreggian
programme.sub-title: Works by Matteis, Tartini, Bach & Vivaldi
programme.desc: The six-concert series “Io suono italiano” is dedicated to music of Italian composers and performed by Italian musicians on Italian instruments. The concert programs cover four centuries of music: from Girolamo Frescobaldi and Antonio Vivaldi to more contemporary music by Ennio Morricone and Azio Corghi. Each program presents more familiar pieces alongside lesser-known compositions. These performances were filmed at the atmospheric Teatro Sociale in Rovigo, Italy, in January 2021. In this program, Federico Guglielmo (violin) and Roberto Loreggian (harpsichord) present Baroque music. On the program are Nicola Matteis's Passaggio rotto e Andamento veloce per violino solo (from Ayres for the Violini), Giuseppe Tartini's Sonata in G minor Op. 1 No. 10 (B.g10) “Didone abbandonata”, J. S. Bach's Concerto in F major for solo harpsichord, BWV 978 (a transcription of Antonio Vivaldi's Violin Concerto in G major, Op. 3 No. 3, RV 310), and Vivaldi's Sonata IV in D major, RV 755.

programme.title: Quatuor Ebène
programme.sub-title: Beethoven - String Quartet No. 7 & 13, and Op. 133
programme.desc: Renowned French string quartet Quatuor Ébène marked the 250th birth anniversary of Ludwig van Beethoven (1770-1827) with a remarkable project: recording all of the great composer's sixteen string quartets. For five years, violinists Pierre Colombet and Gabriel Le Magadure, violist Marie Chilemme, and cellist Raphaël Merlin immersed themselves in Beethoven's 650 pages of sheet music. Their efforts culminated in the performance of the composer's complete repertoire for string quartet, which covers three decades of Beethoven's musical creativity, during six impressive concerts at Philharmonie de Paris in the autumn of 2020. Quatuor Ébène explored every facet of Beethoven's string quartet repertoire: from the youthful Opus 18 string quartets to the Razumovsky, Harp, and Serioso quartets (Opus 59, 74, and 95) from his middle period, and finally, the depth of his late quartets (Opus 127 to 135). This program features Quatuor Ébène performing Beethoven's String Quartet No. 7 in F major, Op. 59, No. 1, known as “Razumovsky” String Quartet No. 13 in B-flat major, Op. 130 and the monumental Great Fugue, Op. 133. This concert performance was recorded at Philharmonie de Paris on October 12, 2020.

programme.title: Secretos De Villanas

programme.title: Café con Canela
programme.desc: Luz Blanchet, Natalia Valenzuela y Suly Castillo presentan una revista femenina para mejorar tu día. Amor, familia, salud, mascotas, entretenimiento, moda y mucho más.

programme.title: Volver a Amar
programme.desc: Volver a Amar - La Gran Discusión: Orhan consigue convencer al patrón para no ir a trabajar, pero la abuela y la tía de Selin organizan una visita que complica los planes de la pareja.

programme.title: Volver a Amar
programme.desc: Volver a Amar - El Asalto De Fatih: Fadik le dice a Zeynep que hará todo lo posible para separar a su madre de Haydar. Fatih trata de colarse en la casa de Zeynep para estar cerca suyo.

programme.title: El Amor Frente al Poder
programme.desc: El Amor Frente al Poder - Otra Vez Tan Cerca: Zuhré consigue trabajo en la casa del dueño del hogar. Rüveyda está por hacer una entrega y aparece Zeyit para evitarlo, allí es secuestrada por Alí.

programme.title: El Amor Frente al Poder
programme.desc: El Amor Frente al Poder - ¿Qué Somos?: Rüveyda intenta escapar pero no lo logra, Alí la lleva a comer. Zuhré llama a Zeyit, él llega hasta su trabajo y le pregunta que es lo que son.

programme.title: El Amor Frente al Poder
programme.desc: El Amor Frente al Poder - Nosotros Somos Los Ricos: Zeyit continúa preocupado por Rüveyda. Ali intenta ayudarla a escapar, pero su padre lo descrubre y lo expone frente al resto de la familia.

programme.title: El Amor Frente al Poder
programme.desc: El Amor Frente al Poder - Buscando Un Trato: Zuhré se da cuenta de donde estaba Rüveyda y decide tomar cartas en el asunto. Ella termina buscando a Fikret para hacer un trato.

programme.title: El Amor Frente al Poder
programme.desc: El Amor Frente al Poder - Pedido Especial: Luego de todo lo vivido Rüveyda perdona a Zuhré por todo aquello por lo cual antes la culpaba. Alí no deja de pensar en lo ocurrido.

programme.title: ¿Qué Culpa Tiene Fatmagül?
programme.desc: ¿Qué Culpa Tiene Fatmagül? - Confusión: Kerim tiene trabas al tramitar su visa. Fatmagül se siente confundida. Rahmi por fin enfrenta a Mukaddes. Erdogan y su padre hacen un plan para tener más poder dentro de la empresa.

programme.title: ¿Qué Culpa Tiene Fatmagül?
programme.desc: ¿Qué Culpa Tiene Fatmagül? - Desesperanza: Kerim y los demás tienen problemas con los dueños de la casa. Mustafá recibe visita de un viejo amigo. Fatmagül hace una llamada que le quita toda esperanza.

programme.title: ¿Qué Culpa Tiene Fatmagül?
programme.desc: ¿Qué Culpa Tiene Fatmagül? - Asu: Asu intenta localizar a Fatmagül. Rifad tiene una ataque al corazón y Erdogan jura vengarse. Mukaddes y toda la familia intentan quedar bien con sus anfitriones.

programme.title: ¿Qué Culpa Tiene Fatmagül?
programme.desc: ¿Qué Culpa Tiene Fatmagül? - Nuevos Amigos: Fatmagül está cada vez más cansada de vivir con Mukaddes. Erdogan decide tomar su lugar en la empresa inmediatamente. Kerim y Fatmagül hacen nuevos amigos.

programme.title: ¿Qué Culpa Tiene Fatmagül?
programme.desc: ¿Qué Culpa Tiene Fatmagül? - Convivencia: Mustafá se da cuenta de que lo están vigilando. Eve Nine le pide a Kerim que haga algo para resolver la situación de Fatmagül. Vivir con Mukaddes se vuelve cada vez más complicado.

programme.title: ¿Qué Culpa Tiene Fatmagül?
programme.desc: ¿Qué Culpa Tiene Fatmagül? - Llamada: Vural habla y mete en problemas a los demás. Munir debe ir de nuevo a salvarlos. Selim falta a un evento familiar importante. Fatmagül consigue hacer una llamada y Eve Nine la descubre.

programme.title: ¿Qué Culpa Tiene Fatmagül?
programme.desc: ¿Qué Culpa Tiene Fatmagül? - Aquella Noche: El suegro de Selim está muy molesto y le pone un ultimátum. Eve Nine y Mukaddes van al pueblo. Erdogan y Vural siguen en prisión y Kerim le dice la verdad a Fatmagül sobre esa noche.

programme.title: ¿Qué Culpa Tiene Fatmagül?
programme.desc: ¿Qué Culpa Tiene Fatmagül? - Dudas: Kerim obliga a Fatmagül a hablar con él pero ella sigue sin creerle. Eve Nine está muy feliz de haber encontrado trabajo. Kerim se da cuenta que irse es más difícil de lo que cree.

programme.title: Corazón indomable: Propuesta de matrimonio

programme.title: Destilando amor: Locura pasional
programme.desc: Minerva y Fedra idean un nuevo plan para evitar que Rodrigo se reencuentre con Gaviota. Aarón le ofrece a Gaviota ser la nueva gerente de las empresas Montalvo.

programme.title: Teresa: Nuevo hogar
programme.desc: Teresa está decidida a irse de su casa para vivir con Arturo. Refugio se pone mal y es llevada al hospital.

programme.title: Amor real: Siempre te amaré

programme.title: Corazón indomable: Propuesta de matrimonio
programme.desc: Maricruz llora desconsolada en su habitación, pues el corazón le gana al ver a Octavio y no puede cumplir su venganza el príncipe Karim le pide a Maricruz que sea su esposa.

programme.title: Cuando me enamoro: Promesa alentadora
programme.desc: Renata arregla los conflictos con Regina y ésta última pide hablar con Fina. Renata es echada de la casa por Roberta y le reclama el dije que le pertenece. Fina comienza a ejecutar su plan y se hace unos análisis con la ayuda de su médico.

programme.title: Al diablo con los guapos: Noticia embarazosa
programme.desc: Regina se encuentra con François, quien amenaza con matar a Constancio. Julio amenaza con matar a Damián y a Carla. Mili arruina el anuncio de Alejandro ante la familia al revelar que será papá y todos creen que es ella quien está embarazada.

programme.title: Fuego en la sangre: Temores
programme.desc: Juan le propone a Sofía huir de nuevo. El Padre le pide a Oscar pensar bien las cosas antes de quererse realmente casar. Fernando se descuida y Gabriela casi descubre la carta que le dejó Don Bernardo.

programme.title: María Mercedes
programme.desc: El Chupes y doña Filo se casan. Mística recibe la noticia de que está embarazada. María Mercedes regaña a Rosario por haber salido con Ricardo.

programme.title: Marimar

programme.title: Marimar
programme.desc: Marimar tendrá que abandonar la hacienda porque sus tierras son yacimientos de petróleo Sergio quiere proteger los intereses de Marimar y su hija.

programme.title: María, la del barrio
programme.desc: Tita sigue saliendo con Nandito para que María no lo vea más. Agripina no deja de preocuparse. Soraya logra llamar la atención del papá de Alicia.

programme.title: María, la del barrio
programme.desc: Tita realiza una fiesta en su casa e invita a Nandito solo para desenmascararlo frente a María pero las cosas no salen como ella esperaba. María presenta a Nandito ante toda la familia.

programme.title: María Mercedes
programme.desc: El Chupes y doña Filo se casan. Mística recibe la noticia de que está embarazada. María Mercedes regaña a Rosario por haber salido con Ricardo.

programme.title: María Mercedes

programme.title: La que no podía amar
programme.desc: Ana Paula llora desesperada al enterarse que su bebé murió. Rosaura idea un nuevo plan para lograr que Ana Paula se interesé de nuevo en Rogelio.

programme.title: La que no podía amar
programme.desc: Rogelio acepta casarse con Vanesa a cambio de que ella le dé a Ana Paula la sangre que necesita para salvar su vida. Gustavo le confiesa a Cynthia el dolor que siente al ver a Ana Paula enferma.

programme.title: La que no podía amar
programme.desc: María le cuenta a Ana Paula como fue que perdió a hija. Cynthia se molesta al ver que María le exige a Vanesa que se aleje de Rogelio. Efraín intenta matar a Gustavo al verlo cerca de Ana Paula.

programme.title: La que no podía amar
programme.desc: Ana Paula y Rogelio se molestan al recibir la noticia de que Margarito fue adoptado por otro matrimonio. Cynthia logra que Gustavo se case con ella para así poder cobrar su herencia.

programme.title: Juro que te amo
programme.desc: Mariela le pide ayuda a Justino para encontrar a Max y que les devuelva su dinero. Fausta fallece por culpa de Leonora. Max huye del país y se va a Nueva York. Cristina le confiesa a Renato que lo ama, Rogelio los escucha y le dispara.

programme.title: Juro que te amo
programme.desc: Rodrigo le dice a José María que terminó con ella porque siempre ha estado enamorado de él. Sara entrega a Rogelio a la policía. Renato le confiesa a Mariano que tiene un amorío con Cristina. Ivana escucha que Julio y Leonora fueron amantes.

programme.title: Juro que te amo
programme.desc: El juez le niega la libertad condicional a Justino al ser acusado por las muertes de Alejandro y de Basilio. Malena y Mariela no hacen nada para impedir que Justino sea transferido a la cárcel.

programme.title: Juro que te amo
programme.desc: Mariano le informa a Antonia y su familia que Justino fue trasladado a prisión. Violeta le cuenta a Antonia que Maximiliano le pidió huir con el dinero que robó.

programme.title: La desalmada: El nuevo alcalde
programme.desc: Rafael no le cree a Fernanda y no quiere volver a verla. Candela es rescatada tras ser secuestrada por los hombres de Octavio. César es detenido por el robo en El Primor. David pide a Fernanda las pruebas de los fraudes de su padre y Octavio.

programme.title: Soy tu dueña: El exnovio
programme.desc: Ivana planea separar a Valentina de José Miguel. Leonor visita a Valentina para pedirle un préstamo, ofreciéndole un predio como garantía. José Miguel le da la noticia a Don Ernesto que se casa con Valentina en la hacienda.

programme.title: La usurpadora: Justicia
programme.desc: Lalita encuentra el diario de Paola. Las declaraciones de Carlos Daniel terminan por hundir a Paola y Paulina queda en libertad. Osvaldo se va de la casa de Lourdes.

programme.title: La Gata: Recuperando la memoria
programme.desc: Agustín se muestra nervioso al ver que Pablo y Mariano están buscando desesperadamente a Lorenza. Fela recuerda todo y les confiesa a todos que Agustín fue la persona que la secuestró.

programme.title: La que no podía amar: Amores prohibidos
programme.desc: Miguel le hace pensar a Ana Paula que Rogelio no se hará cargo de su hijo. María le pide a Efraín que le diga si está enamorado de Macaria. Bruno logra que unas personas se lleven a Margarito a un orfanato.

programme.title: Sortilegio: Dolorosa verdad
programme.desc: Lisette le promete a Letty pagar su operación contra la leucemia. Elena se pone mal al saber que María José ha recuperado la memoria. Fernando sufre un terrible accidente.

programme.title: La desalmada: El nuevo alcalde
programme.desc: Rafael no le cree a Fernanda y no quiere volver a verla. Candela es rescatada tras ser secuestrada por los hombres de Octavio. César es detenido por el robo en El Primor. David pide a Fernanda las pruebas de los fraudes de su padre y Octavio.

programme.title: Vecinos: La telenovela
programme.desc: Germán convence a los vecinos de que permitan la grabación de una telenovela en el edificio, sin imaginar quién sería la estrella. Lorena le hará caso a Benito y decidirá darle otra oportunidad al amor.

programme.title: La familia P. Luche
programme.desc: Federica intenta seducir a Ludovico pero él no se da cuenta y ella llora porque perdieron la llama de la pasión. Ludovico y Federica buscan como reavivar su matrimonio y hacen un juego de cambio de personalidad.

programme.title: La familia P. Luche
programme.desc: El novio de Bibi, Manuel, la invita a Valle del Nabo a pasar el fin de semana. La familia de Bibi los alcanza en casa de Manuel. Manuel termina con Bibi por ser amargada y rara.

programme.title: Los héroes del norte: Cruzando fronteras
programme.desc: Los héroes no puedan entrar a los Estados Unidos para su presentación en Los Ángeles. Así que tratan de arreglar su situación y, al hacerlo, se descubren detalles del pasado de los héroes que nadie se esperaba.

programme.title: Nosotros los guapos
programme.desc: Vítor y Albertano acompañan a Lupita al mandado lo que no es una buena decisión porque tienen que enfrentarse al güero, mientras que doña Cuca y Nacho se quedan solos en casa.

programme.title: Nosotros los guapos
programme.desc: Albertano se sube al metro a cantar para pedir dinero, se encuentra con el Vítor vendiendo discos piratas y se enoja con él porque quiere quitarle la clientela. Un policía les ordena a Albertano y al Vítor que se bajen.

programme.title: Una familia de diez
programme.desc: Plácido y Plutarco pueden ser recontratados en la empresa de don Justo. Además, Justito, Martina y Victoria apuestan que sus propias mamás son las mejores del mundo.

programme.title: Una familia de diez
programme.desc: El peluche favorito de Victoria aparece roto, por lo que Plutarco y Gaby se transforman en detectives para encontrar al culpable. Renata pone a Licha a hacer las tareas del hogar.

programme.title: Una familia de diez
programme.desc: Jessica y don Justo se pelean por tener a Plácido como empleado solo para poder humillarlo. Gaby comienza a tener náuseas y las mujeres de la casa creen que está embarazada de nuevo.

programme.title: Una familia de diez
programme.desc: Gaby y Plutarco creen que Justito se va a poner celoso con la llegada del nuevo bebé. Plácido decide apostar en la quiniela del fútbol y descubre que tiene los números ganadores, pero Renata comete un error al poner la apuesta.

programme.title: María de Todos los Ángeles
programme.desc: Albertano le confiesa a Lucha que está enamorado de María y quiere casarse con ella. María debe decidir si quedarse con Albertano o iniciar una vida al lado de un nuevo amor.

programme.title: María de Todos los Ángeles

programme.title: A Killer's Mistake
programme.desc: Kent McGowen was obsessed with the idea of being a ‘Superman Cop'. He was so obsessed that he was willing to go against official procedures and manipulate evidence in order to set up a scenario involving one arrest, and another arrest warrant for 42-year old mother Susan Diane Harrison - who had previously complained about him. McGowen then willingly executed the arrest warrant himself, all through unlawful means. Susan was killed just 6 seconds after McGowen forcefully entered her home. To this day the convicted murderer insists on his innocence - that he asked Susan to lower her gun and acted in self-defence after a stand-off. But nothing adds up. The autopsy acts as a roadmap to the truth.

programme.desc: There's a myth that models don't eat fatty foods to keep their figures in trim.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.desc: Today, we're grilling green with vegetables we love like asparagus, corn, and mushrooms. Celebrate meatless grilling in all its verdant glory. From a new egg salad with grilled fresh hearts of palm, to a squash, black bean, and queso fresco pizza you grill directly over the fire. And grilled cheese with portobello mushrooms served in a swirl of blazing cognac. (S2 E04)

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.desc: How about upping your grill game with steaks you may not be familiar with, such as secreto or spinalis dorsi? Secreto is a hyper-flavorful steak cut from a hog's belly with a grilled vegetable sauce, romesco. Spinalis dorsi the most delectable part of a rib roast reborn as a steak, and grilled with bourbon. And grill a brisket steak fragrant with sizzling shallot sage butter. (S2 E05)

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.desc: Looking back to when our ancestors grilled in the fireplace, on stones around the campfire and directly on the embers, Primal Grilling will make you a barbecue rock star. Try ember-grilled bread roasted vegetable salad, chicken hanging in midair over a smoky fire, and amaretti-stuffed pears grilled on primordial slabs of salt, grilling techniques as old as humankind itself. (S2 E06)

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.desc: In today's show, Texas barbecue meets Mexican spice as we explore how American barbecue techniques can enhance three classic Mexican dishes: snapper in pipian in a grilled vegetable and pumpkin seed sauce, pork shoulder pibil smoke-roasted in banana leaves, and a Project Fire first, a dessert quesadilla lavished with bananas and dulce de leche. (S2 E07)

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.desc: Most barbecue enthusiasts can name the big three of barbecue: Kansas City ribs, Carolina pulled pork, and Texas smoked brisket. But what about some of the lesser-known styles? Cornell chicken was created by a Cornell University poultry scientist and today served in upstate New York. Up in Anchorage, Alaska, we have sweet yet smokey barbecued salmon. (S2 E08)

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.desc: Everyone knows that a good barbecue makes the perfect prelude to the game. In this show, we explore how my home state of Florida reimagines three tailgate classics. Get ready for pork shooters stuffed with shrimp, cheese and sausage, wings blasted with fire water, and smoky hamburgers like you've never experienced. The secret? Lace them with chopped barbecued brisket. (S2 E09)

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.desc: The pork shoulder, aka Boston butt, gives us Carolina pulled pork. The majestic beef shoulder (yes, there is such a cut) becomes a Texas barbecued beef clod. As for lamb shoulder, Moroccans cook it in a fire-heated underground clay oven to make their legendary mechoui. This show explores the richest, meatiest, most flavorful cut you find in the meat department: the shoulder. (S2 E10)

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.desc: Chino-Latino originated with Chinese laborers who immigrated to Cuba, Trinidad, and elsewhere in the Caribbean to work the plantations. They developed a unique mashup of Asian and West Indian cooking—the subject of today's show. Get ready for tangerine teriyaki chicken, butter rum grilled plantains, smoky baby back ribs with guava barbecue sauce, and Korean brisket tacos. (S2 E11)

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.desc: In Miami, our food culture is firmly anchored in Latin America and the West Indies. Our Miami Spice menu begins with a Project Fire first: the grilled mojito cocktail. Next comes Florida lobster grilled with rum butter baste and mango salsa, then plate-burying island spice beef plate ribs. Our grand finale? Turkey adobo with garlicky mojo de ajo. (S2 E12)

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.desc: Steak. It offers an irrefutable argument for simplicity, but it can also be the perfect foil for all the rubs, marinades, butters, and sauces you can throw at it. It's easy to grill, but takes a lifetime to perfect. Let's take a look back on how steak has evolved through three iconic TV series: Primal Grill, Project Smoke, and Project Fire. (S2 E13)

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.desc: Barbecue Health Food: A little-known fact-Steven Raichlen's first James Beard Award-winning book wasn't about barbecue, but a book on healthy eating. This show harnesses the flavor- boosting, fat-melting power of live fire to produce grilled fare that not only tastes good but is good for you. From the paellas of Spain to the grilled beef salads of Southeast Asia. (S3 E01)

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.desc: Steak. Few other words in the English language have such power to make our hearts beat faster and our mouths water than sizzling slabs of beef seared over live fire. In this show we embark on some meaty globe hopping, exploring over-the-top steaks from France, Cambodia, and the American Southwest. Hot fire. Sizzling meat. It's a carnivore's dream come true. (S3 E02)

programme.title: Go Big or Go Home
programme.desc: Fuming over Froy's departure, Matt loses his temper on a dominatrix and her client and packs his bags to return to LA.? Down two repo men, the pressure is on Ronnie and Carlos, who interrupt a couple in the middle of their less-than-holy matrimony.

programme.title: Smoke, Lead, and Alcohol
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy venture into one of the city's most dangerous neighborhoods, only to find a debtor ready to defend his ride by pumping it full of lead, with no concern for who gets caught in the crossfire.

programme.title: We Weren't Informed
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy end up on one of the weirdest repo's they've ever encountered when a white cargo van unleashes a wave of workers. Then, Lou, Sonia, and Rob go green when they find they learn the Mercedes Benz they are after has been converted to run on biodiesel. And finally, Matt and Froy can't seem to get a word in edgewise when they encounter a shrieking girl and her biker boyfriend who claim their Mercedes was paid in full. Little do our guys know that she was right all along.

programme.title: Taken for a Ride
programme.desc: A professional stunt driver slips through Froy and Sonia's grasp, sending them on a violent high speed chase. Matt offends a pretty RO who seeks womanly revenge, and Froy and Carlos go undercover at a lowrider show. And when Sonia announces a dangerous plan to save the company from the lawsuit, the team must decide whether they're willing to risk it all.

programme.title: Airplane Arrest
programme.desc: Lou and Froy repo an airplane, but Froy finds himself in handcuffs when Lou takes off. Matt joins Sonia on a repo from a pole dancing studio, but gets more than he bargained for.

programme.title: Gypsy Hunter
programme.desc: Reeling from the shootout, Lou tracks down one of the culprits and enacts and elaborate plot of revenge with the help of Froy and Carlos.

programme.title: Don't You Dare Lift-off
programme.desc: First, Froy, Matt, and Lou turn tail and bail when bats and guns are swung towards them. Later, things get heated for Matt and Sonia just before they head out with Esteban and Lou to ambush a helicopter pilot.

programme.title: A Zamboni?
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy interrupt a debtor's tattooing session to reclaim his vehicle. Then, Sonia and Lyndah find themselves in an uncomfortable situation when they barge in on a couple engaging in some risqué role-playing. And finally, Lou & Matt hit the ice and a bunch of irate hockey players in an effort to repossess a Zamboni

programme.title: Jet Skis and Massages
programme.desc: First, the team heads to the beach to grab a little sun as well as two luxury jet skis. Then, Lou and Froy get in touch with their sensitive side when they confront a massage therapist who's as skilled with her hands as she is with her feet. And finally, Lou and Sonia are unknowingly hired to pull a prank on a debtor, which could cost everyone.

programme.title: Wrench in the Works
programme.desc: First, a wrench is thrown in the works, and at the car, when Froy and Matt try to repo from a plumber. Then, the duo go out again to try to repo a car from a slap-happy debtor, but unfortunately the car has a boot on it. And finally, Froy, Matt, Lyndah, and Sonia head out to the ranch to repo a tractor from some pushy ranch hands.

programme.title: Role-players and Blade Swayers
programme.desc: Lou, Matt, and Froy get interrupted on a routine job by a registered owner with an unregistered blade. Then, Matt and Froy head out to the country to reclaim a Prius from a quintet of socially maladapted role-players.

programme.title: Get That Prowler
programme.desc: First, Lou, Sonia, and Froy unfurl an elaborate sting when they repo a taxicab by tricking its driver into picking them up. But what to do with his ferociously inebriated client? Then, Matt and Froy attempt to repo a DeLorean from a debtor whose car isn't all that's stuck in the 80's. Finally, Lou and Sonia square off against an overgrown child who isn't giving up his Plymouth Prowler without a tussle.

programme.title: Bouquets and Blowtorches
programme.desc: The team returns from a successful mission in Vegas, but there's trouble brewing within the crew's ranks. Ronnie and Carlos repo from a self-defense instructor who lets his students do his dirty work, Matt and Froy confront a delinquent delivery man steeling flowers from graves, and Lou and Carlos are left defenseless against gang members with blowtorches. Can Lou still keep his cool in the high pressure repo business, or will there be repercussions for Matt and Froy that no one saw coming?

programme.title: Repo Arigato, Mr. Roboto
programme.desc: Sonia and Carlos put their best performance in when they attempt to repossess a vehicle from a pair of silver-painted robot men.? Matt and Froy need a second opinion when they run into a debtor with a questionable claim about a life-threatening illness.?

programme.title: The Car That Rolled Away
programme.desc: Lou and Lyndah try to negotiate a set of keys away from a raucous group of drunken outdoorsmen. Then, Froy and Lyndah repo a vehicle from a unruly and untalented guitarist. Plus, Froy and Sonia bite off more than they can chew when they try to reclaim an SUV from a confused and embittered former football player.

programme.title: Best Of Week, With Hugh Grant, Marie Kondo, Drew-Gooder Surprise

programme.title: The Hobby
programme.desc: A McDonald's Happy Meal shortage. A security guard escort. Guns pulled in a Target parking lot. All of these are caused by a common factor: trading cards. In 2020, a new BOOM began. For the first time, large hedge funds, celebrities like Logan Paul and Steve Aoki, nostalgic millennials, entrepreneurs like Josh Luber, and billionaires scrambled to add sports, Pokémon, and other hot item cards to their collections and portfolios. Over the next two years, the hobby exploded — even causing card grading services to shut down due to overwhelming customer service. This documentary is a character-driven feel good deep dive into the high-stakes, eccentric world of card collecting, following buyers, sellers, card shop owners, graders, online streamers, auctioneers, and more, who all participate in the hobby in their own unique ways. Directed by Morgan Jon Fox.

programme.title: Noma: My Perfect Storm
programme.desc: Creative genius René Redzepi is renowned as one of the world's best chefs. His restaurant Noma was voted best restaurant in the world four times. He has been credited with revolutionizing the food world with his radical take on classic cuisine. Explore his universe with unprecedented access into his kitchen as he strives to achieve perfection and concoct bold, exciting dishes for diners from around the world. Directed by Pierre Deschamps

programme.title: Deltas of the World
programme.desc: The journey leads through one of the most fascinating delta landscapes in the world. Starting in the untouched jungle of the Tumucumaque in the north of the Amazon delta, the journey continues south by boat across the 30 kilometre wide river to the Ilha de Maraj. The largest river island in the world, as large as Switzerland, is surrounded by wide beaches, mangrove forests and floodplain forests. On the island untouched jungle and wet savannah characterise the land. Fishermen and aai farmers live from the fruits of nature on the edge of the numerous river veins and flood plains and the collection of medicinal plants serves here, far away from civilization, as a living for the people. On the south side of the delta in the city of Belem we explore the exotic world of the famous Ver-o-Peso market with its impressive variety of fish, tropical fruits, spices and medicinal herbs.

programme.title: Deltas of the World
programme.sub-title: Irrawaddy Delta: The Magical World of Mangroves
programme.desc: The Irrawaddy Delta in southern Myanmar is home to the most diverse mangrove forests in the world. The forests serve as natural protection against cyclones that regularly strike the region. The Irrawaddy's widely branching tributaries not only provide schools of fish and rich nutrients, but also function as the most important transport route for the people living in the delta. The greengrocer couple U Tin Hlaing and Daw Khin Lay supply the villages downstream with their fresh produce. But they do not go any further than the Meinmahla Kyun Wildlife Sanctuary. From that point on, the river becomes increasingly turbulent, too dangerous for their small, flat boat. The sanctuary is home to a variety of animal species including the rare Irrawaddy dolphins, saltwater crocodiles, birds of prey such as black kites and brahminy kites, migratory birds such as spoon-billed sandpipers, woodcocks, great cormorants and various anatids. Ranger Lha Soe Win and his colleagues regularly patrol the nature reserve to monitor the animal population and make sure the mangroves are no longer illegally logged for firewood. Since the 1970s, the mangrove population has declined by more than 60 percent, with dramatic consequences for the inhabitants of the delta. Cyclone Nargis, the most devastating cyclone to date, claimed the lives of around 130,000 Burmese in 2008. Together with scientists from the conservation charity Flora and Fauna International, the rangers are working on reforesting the mangroves to restore their function as a natural barrier in the future.

KAPAMA, meaning ‘place of peace', is an ultra-luxurious and prestigious Lodge that exudes calmness and depicts the pinnacle of elegant Safari accommodation, with wraparound views of the African bush enhancing the overall sense of tranquillity. A special Safari experience is the Romantic Sleep-out Platform where Guests can sleep under the Stars on a raised platform in the middle of the African plains.

programme.title: Asia
programme.sub-title: Secret Lives, Hidden Places - Great Gobi National Park: Mongolia - Following the Wild Camels
programme.desc: The Great Gobi Nationalpark in the southwest of Mongolia is home oft he most fascinationg mammals alive: the wild camels. The arcaic desert, impenetrable and misterious, ist he home of approximately 800 wild camels which are nearly extinct. The Gobi is one of the most sparsely populated areas around the world. We experience humans which live in the rough and misanthropic desert: Jangaa who breeds camels and specialises in camel polo Surendjav who owns a salt mine Erdene who built an oasis in the middle of the dessert.

programme.title: Asia
programme.sub-title: Secret Lives, Hidden Places - Gaoligongshan Park: China - Himalaya's Gold
programme.desc: In western China, along the border to Tibet is the Baima Snow Mountain reserve. Both humans and animals have to be persistant, willpowered and strong to be able to survive in over 3000 metres height. The Baima snow mountain reserve is one of the most mysterious and impenetrable regions of the world, full of breathtaking beauty and contrasts.

programme.title: The Incredible Shrinking Man
programme.desc: While on a boating trip, Scott Carey (Grant Williams) is exposed to a radioactive cloud. Nothing seems amiss at first, but several months later Scott realizes that he's shrunk in height by several inches. He sees a doctor, who admits that he's baffled. As Scott continues to shrink, decreasing to three feet tall, he becomes bitter, and lashes out at his wife, Louise (Randy Stuart). He begins to fear a cure will never be found -- since even as he becomes a national sensation, he's still shrinking.

programme.title: The Invisible Man Returns

But when sympathetic Dr. Griffin (John Sutton) injects him with a serum that renders him invisible, Radcliffe is able to escape and search for the real culprit. With Inspector Sampson (Cecil Kellaway) of Scotland Yard hot on his trail, Radcliffe begins to suspect that a recent hire in his family's mining company might have the answers he seeks.

programme.title: The Invisible Man
programme.desc: While researching a new drug, Dr. Jack Griffin (Claude Rains) stumbles on a potion that can make him invisible. When he reveals his new ability to his old mentor (Henry Travers) and his fiancée (Gloria Stuart), it's clear that a side effect of the potion is insanity. Jack goes on a violent rampage, and the police struggle to hunt him down, unable to see their target, while his mentor and his former partner (William Harrigan) desperately try to devise a plan to capture him.

programme.title: Project Runway
programme.desc: The designers are excited to attend a press event, but their festive mood is quickly spoiled when the party turns out to be a challenge. The misdirect proves to be more than most of the designers can handle, as many of them have to start their looks over completely when criticized by a disappointed Tim Gunn. Emily Ratajkowski joins the judging panel.

programme.title: Project Runway
programme.desc: The exhausted designers are whisked away to Universal Studios Orlando to recharge their batteries with a roller coaster or two. They are then challenged to find inspiration from their experience at the theme park to design a look for the “Urban Jungle.” Guest judge Rebecca Minkoff joins.

programme.title: Project Runway
programme.desc: The designers are faced with their second Team Challenge of the season and must work together to create 3-piece collections to be shown in a SoHo pop-up shop. However, working in teams leads to tensions and tantrums as the designers struggle to have their voices heard. Guest judge Kelly Osbourne returns.

programme.title: Project Runway
programme.desc: The designers are pleasantly surprised when each one of them gets a special guest from home. But the emotional reunions with their mothers, daughters, and friends are quickly overshadowed by the drama of the next challenge when the designers learn that their newly arrived loved ones will also be their clients—and there is $50,000 on the line! Olivia Culpo and Katia Beauchamp join the judging panel.

programme.title: Project Runway
programme.desc: The designers take a majestic helicopter ride high above NYC for inspiration for their next challenge: to create an editorial, high fashion look for Marie Claire magazine. Guest judges Anne Fulenwider and Camilla Belle join the panel.

programme.title: Project Runway
programme.desc: The designers are challenged to draw inspiration from metal and machinery for their next look. However, in another Project Runway first, they must create their avant-garde design using the metallic unconventional materials, as well as conventional materials from Mood. Shiri Appleby joins the judging panel.

programme.title: Project Runway
programme.desc: In the final challenge before Fashion Week, the designers take a surprise trip to Austin, Texas, where the city's unofficial slogan is “Keep Austin Weird!” Once there, the designers are faced with an Unconventional Materials Challenge, leading them to create amazing (and weird!) pieces with the knowledge that the losing designer will be sent home just one step away from Fashion Week. Guest judge Priyanka Chopra joins.

programme.title: Project Runway
programme.desc: After heading home to work on their Fashion Week collections, the designers are visited by Tim, who is not impressed with everything they have created so far. The designers return to NYC and present the judges with three pieces from their collection, and all of them realize how much work they have left before presenting all of their pieces at Fashion Week. Michael Kors returns as a guest judge.

programme.desc: Leave your worries from the world above behind and dive into a vibrant undersea world inhabited by the iconic sharks, for 80 minutes of Nature Relaxation. programme.title: Morning Inspiration: Painters' Showcase
programme.desc: Painters' Showcase S1E1 — Extraordinary paintings hand-selected by the Loupe team.

programme.title: Wanderlust
programme.desc: Living Creatures E3: Catopia — Revel in the beauty and mystique of cats, big and small, domestic and wild. Embark on a captivating artistic voyage showcasing the allure and playful charm of these creatures, transporting viewers into a world full of feline mischief and majesty.

programme.title: Wanderlust
programme.desc: Living Creatures E4: Feathered Friends — Celebrate the natural beauty and diversity of birds. Explore their symbolism and captivating nature. From the elegance of birds in flight to the intricacies of their plumage, each artwork immerses viewers in the world of these winged creatures.

programme.title: Wanderlust
programme.desc: Epic Landscapes E2: Lakes Rivers & Oceans — Discover an enchanting collection featuring breathtaking photographs of epic waterscapes. Immerse yourself in the picturesque beauty of serene lakes, meandering rivers, and vast oceans, capturing the awe-inspiring harmony of water's natural grandeur.

programme.title: Wanderlust
programme.sub-title: Earth And Stars III — A Sustainable Future by Climate Art Collection
programme.desc: Earth And Stars E3: A Sustainable Future presented by Climate Art Collection — This collection addresses climate change awareness through art, in collaboration with the Climate Art Collection, the largest collection of climate change-related artworks in the world. It highlights the Climate Art Collection's mission to support climate initiatives through art and make scientific concepts more accessible.

programme.title: Wanderlust
programme.desc: Earth And Stars E2: Earth Day — A beautiful, artistic tribute to our planet, from splendid skyscapes and depictions of our solar system, to sprawling forests, snow-capped mountains, and marine animals. The range of styles explore our connection to the vast and vivid universe.

programme.title: Autumn Harvest II
programme.desc: Autumn Harvest E2 — Immerse yourself in a kaleidoscope of fall foliage, where trees dance in radiant shades and leaves gently cascade in the crisp breeze. Delight in intricate still-life images capturing the essence of pumpkin spice and evoking a sense of nostalgia

programme.title: Halloween Party
programme.desc: Halloween Party S1E1 — Bold colors and haunting melodies bring out the magic of Halloween, inviting viewers to revel in the merriment of the holiday. From grinning skulls to moonlit scenes, the collection enchants with its lighthearted take on spooky.

programme.title: Pink Warriors
programme.desc: Pink Warriors S1E1 — This art collection captures unyielding power of women, mirroring the brave fight against breast cancer. The infusion of pink spreads awareness and celebrates the strength within every woman while the music adds an uplifting celebration of life.
